input.background: Exercise 13.1 presented data on birth weights of infants based on the smoking status of mothers. Table 13.3 lists the data. Descriptive statistics are shown in Table 13.10.
input.question: Conduct an ANOVA on these data. Show all hypothesis-testing steps. Step 1: State the hypotheses.

output.answer: Hypotheses. $H_0: \mu_1=\mu_2=\mu_3=\mu_4$ versus $H_3$: at least two of the $\mu_i$ s differ.
